src: A collection of original, innovative ideas and algorithms towards Advanced Literate Machinery. This project is maintained by the OCR Team in the Language Technology Lab, Tongyi Lab, Alibaba Group.
ja: [17] 高度な文書理解（Advanced Literate Machinery）に向けた独創的なアイデアとアルゴリズム集。Alibaba Group 通義 Lab Language Technology Lab の OCR チームが保守。
